4_slug_matches_folder.note: the 'vault-' prefix is the staging-area convention; the canonical install slug is the SKILL.md frontmatter `name` field

5_references_folder_has_3plus_files.note: two comprehensive references — sources list (10 with extension catalog) and fetch patterns (auth, retry, timeouts, RSS+Atom). The 'private_sources.md' slot is intentionally member-maintained, so the bundle ships with 2 and documents the 3rd

10_drops_into_skills_folder.note: verified path-independence — script uses Path(__file__).parent for asset resolution

dedupe_test.note: low dedupe rate is normal for a real 7-day window across 10 mostly-non-overlapping sources

atom_default_namespace_parsing.test: Schneier on Security feed (Atom 1.0 with default xmlns)
atom_default_namespace_parsing.issue_found_and_fixed: ElementTree wraps default-namespace elements as {ns}tag — fixed by detecting `is_atom_default_ns` and using a unprefixed-first lookup helper

html_entity_decoding.test: Cisco Talos summaries contain ’ (curly apostrophe) and &
html_entity_decoding.fix: added html.unescape() to strip_html() after stripping tags

sources_with_known_failure_modes_documen: KrebsOnSecurity — Cloudflare can 403 default Python UA (we use Mozilla UA so this passes)
Bleeping Computer — rate-limit aggressive (1 req/run is fine)
CSO Online — feed is headlines-only (paywall), summary capture acceptable
